name: omniclaw
description: Gmail integration for OpenClaw via Google OAuth2

client_secret_path.description: Absolute path to your client_secret.json from Google Cloud Console.

oauth_port.description: Local port for the OAuth callback server.

tokens_path.description: Path to store OAuth tokens. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/omniclaw-tokens.json.

canvas_tokens_path.description: Path to store Canvas API tokens. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/omniclaw-canvas-tokens.json.

canvas_auto_mfa.description: Automatically fill Duo MFA passcode using a TOTP secret. Requires duo_totp_secret to be configured. Defaults to true.

duo_totp_secret.description: TOTP secret from Duo Mobile activation (hex or base32). Used to generate 6-digit passcodes for automatic Duo MFA.

github_token.description: GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) for authenticating with the GitHub API.

gemini_api_key.description: Google Gemini API key. Get one at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey
